Voiced by 11labs AI. ESPFE

State.Description: New heavy armor. Новая тяжелая броня.

Original.Name: Eating Animations And Sounds SE V1.9.4-42602-1-9-4-1668786874.7z

Add individual animations and sound effects for each food item.

食品ごとに個別のアニメーションとサウンドエフェクトを追加します。
State.Name: Eating Animations and Sounds SE

State.Author: ElSopa
State.Description: Quivers Redone. New Meshes. No ESP. Performance Friendly.
State.Name: ElSopa - Quivers Redone SE

State.Author: Siberpunk
State.Description: Adds new NPCs to reside in buildings left empty after certain vanilla quests. Helps make cities feel a bit more lively and dynamic.

State.Author: Siberpunk
State.Description: Master plugin required by several mods in the Environs series.

Original.Name: Environs - The Shrines of Talos - Patch Collection-85141-3-02-1716012368.7z

State.Author: Siberpunk
State.Description: Adds a series of dynamic changes and environmental details to several locations related to Talos worship. An immersion mod designed to help make the world feel more alive and consequential.
State.Name: Environs - The Shrines of Talos

State.Author: Jonx0r
State.Description: Extended Encounters is a simple mod that adds to the pool of random roadside, wilderness and location encounters in a way that makes the world seem a bit more dynamic and alive without negatively affecting game performance or bloating your save file.
State.Name: Extended Encounters

Original.Name: Faultier's PBR Armors - Styles of Skyrim patch-175319-1-0-1774473759.7z

State.Author: Faultierfan
State.Description: Complete retexture of the vanilla armors, weapons, and clothes, using Community Shaders' PBR feature.
State.Name: Faultier's PBR Armors and Clothes

State.Author: Faultierfan
State.Description: Complete retexture of the vanilla armors, weapons, and clothes, using Community Shaders' PBR feature.
State.Name: Faultier's PBR Armors and Clothes

State.Author: GiraPomba
State.Description: Context-aware animations when interacting with the world in FIRST PERSON. Animated greeting of NPCs, pickpocketing, lockpicking, and more!
State.Name: First Person Interactions

State.Author: Anbeegod
State.Description: Expands Aela the Huntress with 200 immersive and lore-friendly voiced lines. Includes quest and location awareness.
State.Name: Follower Dialogue Expansion - Aela the Huntress

State.Author: Anbeegod
State.Description: Expands Faendal with 240 immersive, lore-friendly lines. Main quest, DLC, guild quest awareness. Environmental awareness.
State.Name: Follower Dialogue Expansion - Faendal

State.Author: Anbeegod
State.Description: Expands Jenassa with 229 immersive and lore-friendly lines. Quest and location awareness.
State.Name: Follower Dialogue Expansion - Jenassa

State.Author: tarlazo
State.Description: An offshoot from Convenient Carriages. After choosing a destination, your followers walk to the carriage and one of them sits upon it. --- ESP-FE
State.Name: Followers Sit on Carriages

State.Author: GiraPomba
State.Description: Eat food or ingredients directly from harvestable flora, by pressing the Dynamic Activation Key.
State.Name: Grab and Eat - Eat directly from harvestable flora

State.Author: wankingSkeever
State.Description: Make Green Thumb perk work on plants like Nirnroot but not stuff like coin purses.
State.Name: Green Thumb Fix

State.Author: Edryu
State.Description: Call your horse, access his inventory, equip saddles and rename it using a single key.
State.Name: Horse Whistle Key

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: This mod expands Molag Bal's daedric quest, giving you the option of choosing an alternative "good guy" route to finish the vanilla quest. Fully voiced, with new scenes and a custom reward: a new follower!
State.Name: House of Horrors - Quest Expansion

State.Author: Exist
State.Description: 2K vanilla landscape textures, upscaled using generative AI, remade normals and specular, and some manual edits. For vanilla lovers only. Primarily made for PBR, but a vanilla replacer with parallax textures is also available.
State.Name: Sloppy Vanilla Landscapes - Parallax and PBR

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: Adds 15+ new fun spells for the Illusion School of Magic. Trick your enemies, control their thoughts, play with their minds!
State.Name: Immersive Illusion Spells

State.Author: SirSalami -  XONextGenXO
State.Description:
Adds several dialogue options to most of Skyrim's NPCs (even ones initially without any dialogue options) allowing for increased immersive interactions and role-play. 



Compatible with every dialogue overhaul / commentary mod such as FCO SE, RDO, GDO and others as it does not conflict or replace and only adds more dialogue.
State.Name: Immersive Speechcraft SE

State.Author: Valdaraak
State.Description: Makes default inns more immersive by adding varying room cost, innkeepers sleeping at night, and a chance that the inn will be full. Offers customizable prices, availability, and the ability to turn off certain features.
State.Name: Improved Innkeepers

State.Author: TheOscar0 - JaySerpa
State.Description: One of the most underwhelming vanilla quests... turned into an epic quest full of player choice. Enjoy!
State.Name: Infiltration - Quest Expansion

State.Author: silvericed
State.Description: Extends Skyrim SE Papyrus scripts (or SKSE/C++ plugins) with JSON based serializable data structures like arrays and maps. Embedded Lua interpreter.
State.Name: JContainers SE

State.Author: dkdoubledub
State.Description: Increases the impact of the choice in The Blessings of Nature through 4 unique voiced NPCs and adaptive changes to Whiterun's Temple of Kynareth.
State.Name: Kyne's Temple Consequences

State.Author: GiraPomba
State.Description:
A preset for functional lights using Immersive Equipment Displays.



Displays for wearable lantern, floating torch, fireball and candlelight. The lights will be turned on/off depending on the occasion(during night or dark interiors for example) or via configured hotkey.
State.Name: Lights On - Wearable Lanterns for Immersive Equipment Displays

Original.Name: Loud And Clear Plus Plus ESPFE-179829-1-12-1778877073.zip

State.Author: Flowrifto
State.Description: A small overhaul of "Loud and Clear." Convince the mercs of Goldenglow that you belong here, persuade Aringoth to resume his work with the Guild, finish the quest without burning any hive, and enter Goldenglow before the quest sends you there!
State.Name: Loud and Clear Plus Plus - A Quest Overhaul

State.Author: SimonMagus
State.Description: Manbeast is a complete overhaul of Skyrim’s Werewolf system designed to balance existing Werewolf mechanics and add powerful new lycanthropic abilities to the game.
State.Name: Manbeast - A Werewolf Overhaul

State.Author: nimwraith
State.Description: Memorable Bounties is a collection of 3 quests, it adds in unique and interesting targets for you to speak with and kill or spare. All quests are heavily inspired by the Witcher series and their amazing quest design.
State.Name: Memorable Bounties - Witcher Inspired Quests

State.Author: MadAborModding
State.Description: Adds a functioning curse to the Ebony Blade and new world encounters. Now the player must find a way to destroy the Blade or succumbing to Mephala is inevitable.
State.Name: Mephala's Curse - Whispering Door Quest Addon

State.Author: Enneal
State.Description: Quest-aware notices for Missives
State.Name: Missives - Notes and Announcements

State.Author: nimwraith
State.Description: Mysteries of the Dwemer centres around Maro, a researcher of the Dwemer who will help explain various parts of their convoluted lore to the player.
State.Name: Mysteries of the Dwemer - Quest Mod

State.Author: Flo27 -- SE Port by Kelsenellenelvian -- AP Port by Scrab
State.Description: Flo27's New Beginnings Mod ported over to be used together with Alternate Perspective
State.Name: New Beginnings - Alternate Perspective Extension

State.Author: Everglaid
State.Description: New lore-friendly accessories with HDT-SMP cloth physics: Satchels, backpacks, cloaks and more!
State.Name: Nirn Necessities - SMP Accessories

State.Author: Leo
State.Description: A collection of PBR addon for various mods.
State.Name: PBR Hub

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: Despite what the game and lore says, most often than not NPCs don't really react to necromancy in any way. You can walk into town with a corpse and no one bats an eye. With this mod, NPCs will now react in ways that reflect their bias against those that openly practice the dark arts.
State.Name: NPCs React To Necromancy (And More)

State.Author: Meridiano
State.Description: Frequent call fix of OnMagicEffectApply event in different scripts.
State.Name: OnMagicEffectApply Replacer

State.Author: exiledviper meh321
State.Description: An SKSE plugin adding several new scripts with native functions that provide various conveniences related to data storage and other misc functions to the scripter/modder.
State.Name: PapyrusUtil SE - Modders Scripting Utility Functions

State.Author: jepster
State.Description: This mod has the goal to provide high quality PBR textures for all plants not yet covered by any other major overhaul
State.Name: PBR Flora Overhaul

State.Author: TheRegisteredOne - ws - wankingSkeever
State.Description: A quest where you can join the Penitus Oculatus after the vanilla "destroy the dark brotherhood" quest and get all the rewards.
State.Name: Penitus Oculatus

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE64 plugin that extends Papyrus script functionality, with over 275 new Papyrus functions, and 29 events.
State.Name: powerofthree's Papyrus Extender

State.Author: Shikyo Kira
State.Description: Your all in 1 skyrim behavior framework. Automated behavior modification extraction, behavior patching and more. Currently still in beta stage
State.Name: Project New Reign - Nemesis Unlimited Behavior Engine

State.Author: jepster
State.Description: Enhances footprints to look more realistic using Physical Based Rendering textures
State.Name: Realistic PBR Footprints

State.Author: anbeegod
State.Description: Adds about 500 lines, including many interactions with the Stormcloak soldiers, new camp banters with hundreds of variants, and expands the Gray-Mane brothers plot to make them an active participant in the Civil War.
State.Name: REBEL NORTH - Immersive Dialogue Expansion - Stormcloaks

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: Interact with friendly and enemy NPCs from afar, with different animations and results based on context and distance.
State.Name: Remote Interactions

State.Author: AndrealphusVIII
State.Description: Turns the Riverwood Trader into an actual mess, to simulate the thieves' break-in. Also adds an option to help clean it up, for a small reward.
State.Name: Riverwood Trader Is A Mess

State.Author: Addi
State.Description: A Community Shaders PBR conversion of Sanguine Symphony's blood textures.
State.Name: Sanguine Symphony - PBR

State.Author: Flowrifto
State.Description: A simple overhaul of "Scroundrel's Folly" that makes Gulum-Ei unessential from the start of the game and gives you more flexibility to complete it.
State.Name: Scoundrel's Folly Plus Plus - A Quest Overhaul

State.Author: henryetha
State.Description: Aid Farengar and Viarmo in a quest that brings the Dragon Cult to life in story and song.
State.Name: Scriptures of the Dragon Cult

State.Author: Enodoc
State.Description: Jarl Balgruuf can now join either the Imperials or the Stormcloaks in the Civil War, and you can persuade him to choose either (including the opposite side to you). Requires Jarl Balgruuf Dilemma by simtam (supermartialbros.esp), which is extended with a full Whiterun Defense quest for the Stormcloaks, and numerous additional dialogue scenes.
State.Name: Serious Civil War Consequences for Jarl Balgruuf

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: Happy Birthday, Skyrim! Fish in third person! Fish in first person! Fish in... second person? Fish in Fish Person! OH, and new lines for the fishing quests and other fishing enhancements!
State.Name: Simple Fishing Overhaul - Animations and Improved Quest Dialogue

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: A simple hunting overhaul that puts gameplay first, while still remaining immersive. Quick and responsive... No tedious or complicated menus... Have NPCs react to your hunting skills with voiced reactions... Sell your carcasses to make a bit of money on the side... Endless possibilities!
State.Name: Simple Hunting Overhaul

State.Author: jayserpa
State.Description: Skills of The Wild adds four  new campfire survival skills: Art of The Hunt, Knower of the Land, Beast Handler and Culinary Arts. They're meant to be compatible with most mods out there, stay balanced throughout an entire playthrough and enhance your experience by letting you roleplay different aspects of Skyrim that were very static in vanilla.
State.Name: Skills of the Wild - New Campfire Survival Skill Trees

State.Author: shazdeh2
State.Description: This is a utility for mod authors, to show keybindings for contextual actions in the HUD.
State.Name: SkyInteract

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: Tired of skooma being so boring? This mod turns skooma into a proper recreational substance with 69 possible scenarios, and a thousand different variations. Funny, yet still immersively immersive.
State.Name: Skyrim on Skooma

Original.Name: Skyrim Reputation Patches for Quest Expansions-79631-2-1-0-1742509344.7z

State.Author: DK
State.Description: A small collection of integration patches for Skyrim Reputation to recognize the new choices offered by quest expansion/alternate route mods.
State.Name: Skyrim Reputation Patches for Vanilla Quest Expansions

State.Description: Compatible with Skyrim Special Edition 1.6.1170 from Steam
State.Name: Skyrim Script Extender (SKSE64)

Original.Name: 1_Skyrim's Got Talent - Improve As a Bard-50357-1-76-1725712975.zip

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: Play instruments, get better, NPCs react to your skill dynamically, many new songs, lots of easter eggs, simple implementation. A compact, yet powerful Bard Gameplay Overhaul.
State.Name: Skyrim's Got Talent - Improve As a Bard

State.Author: TheLootist
State.Description: Adds a new Daedric prince quest where you track down a missing woman, delving into her nightmares and overcoming her fears. Includes, new weapons, equipment and spells.
State.Name: Sleepwalking Into A Nightmare - New Daedric Prince Quest

Original.Name: Smart Optimal Salves - Optimal Potion Hotkey MCM-42402-0-3-1-1759073063.7z

State.Author: wankingSkeever

State.Name: Smart Optimal Salves - Optimal Potion Hotkey MCM

Original.Name: Speaking With Silence Plus Plus ESPFE-175097-1-51-1778707340.zip

State.Author: Flowrifto
State.Description: Mercer is clearly hiding something during the whole Snow Veil delving. Why wouldn't you want to claim this power to open any lock for yourself, right here and there? A roleplay expansion for "Speaking with Silence" filled with consequences!
State.Name: Speaking With Silence Plus Plus - A Thieves Guild Roleplay Expansion

State.Author: reza9892
State.Description: Uses SPID to distribute the footprints spells from the footprints mod, instead of the cloak spell of the original mod
State.Name: SPID for Footprints

State.Author: Vicn
State.Description: Silt Striders start to stride Solstheim.
State.Name: Striding Silt Strider

Original.Name: Taking Care of Business Plus Plus ESPFE-177277-1-11-1778879959.zip

State.Author: Flowrifto
State.Description: An overhaul of "Taking Care of Business," the second quest of the Thieves Guild questline and the third mod of my Thieves Guild series. With it, even more NPCs are made unessential and even more options get added to your game!
State.Name: Taking Care of Business Plus Plus - A Quest Overhaul

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: A fully voiced new quest. Help the people of Skyrim and spread the spirit of Saturalia. Enjoy!
State.Name: The Gift of Saturalia - A Quest for the Holidays

State.Author: soldierofwar
State.Description: Makes Winterhold the city it always should have been
State.Name: The Great City Of Winterhold SSE Edition

Original.Name: The Heart of Dibella - Quest Expansion-94863-1-07-1745181451.rar

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: Tired of having to break into a ladies-only religious building just to start this quest? Is that something your character would never do? This mod has you covered with new roleplaying opportunities, more dialogue and more choices.
State.Name: The Heart of Dibella - Quest Expansion

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: This mod provides new paths (both good and evil) to complete the first Dark Brotherhood quest. Grelod the Kind, you'd better watch out. Fully voiced as usual.
State.Name: Innocence Lost - Quest Expansion

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: This mod enhances Peryite's daedric quest, expanding the vanilla quest with new conversations, scenes and paths to complete the quest with or without cavorting with daedra. Fully voiced.
State.Name: The Only Cure - Quest Expansion

State.Author: nimwraith
State.Description: Meet a travelling poet who seeks to heal damage that he has endured in his tormented past.
State.Name: The Price of Art - Quest Mod

State.Author: Vanessa M and Pat Mahoney
State.Description:
Adds a custom voiced (VA - Pat Mahoney) Thalmor follower to your Skyrim.

A former member of the Thalmor wants a clean start, and only you can save him from his past life.

Why do you always fall for the broken ones?
State.Name: The Thalmor's Shadow - Taliesin (Custom Voiced Follower)

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: Experience a longer version of Mephala's Daedric quest, now with more dialogue, more decisions and a general darker approach to the original quest. Happy spooky month!
State.Name: The Whispering Door - Quest Expansion

State.Author: Anbeegod
State.Description: Defy Nocturnal and unlock yourself from eternal servitude. Adds 4 new voice-acted endings to the Thieves Guild questline, including new story, new rewards, new boss fights. The roleplaying freedom you have been asking for since the first time you finished that questline.
State.Name: Thieves Guild Alternative Endings

State.Author: dfxyz1 Akezhar Wolfpack49
State.Description:
Make game time pass when performing actions like crafting, reading, eating, fishing, building homes etc.

A modified version of Living Takes TIme with extensive mod support and compatibility.  Also a "framework" to help you adding support for other mods.
State.Name: Time Flies SE

State.Author: Tomatokillz
State.Description: PBR Landscapes for the entire game, ECSS, Northern Roads and Seasonal landscapes.
State.Name: TomatoRim PBR Landscapes AIO 1K 2K 4K

State.Author: Maleficus
State.Description: If you find skooma or moon sugar during your travels and are morally averse to using it, selling it, or leaving it behind, you may now turn these illegal items in to your local guard for a small reward. Esl-flagged.
State.Name: Turn in Contraband

State.Author: TheOscar0
State.Description: "Somethin' just ain't right about that Sybille. You know I've never seen her eat a thing? That can't be natural." The Court Wizard of Solitude, Sybille Stentor, has a secret. It's up to you to find out what it is. Investigate her deeds and to decide her fate.
State.Name: Unmasking Sybille

State.Author: Addi
State.Description: A complete AIO PBR texture pack of all of Skyrim's Architecture/Clutter/Actors/Dungeons true to the vanilla aesthetic
State.Name: Vanilla PBR AIO

State.Author: Enodoc
State.Description: Varona Nelas will no longer be killed almost immediately after entering Tel Mithryn for the first time. You will now need to complete Favor Quests for Neloth, Talvas and Elynea before Reluctant Steward will trigger.
State.Name: Varona Nelas Lives Longer - Reluctant Steward Delayed

State.Author: Sluia
State.Description: Improves vanilla transport system by allowing the player to wait for a carriage driver in any inns located in Tamriel.
State.Name: Wait Carriage in Inns - Fast Travel Improvement

State.Author: Kekistann
State.Description: Resources, patches and tweaks curated for the "Wanderer's Way" mod list which can be downloaded through Wabbajack. Unless you are downloading or updating this mod list, I wouldn't recommend installing these files on your own game.
State.Name: Wanderer's Way Resources and Patches

State.Author: nimwraith
State.Description: Whispers of the Depths centres around an Argonian fisherman, Slays-Many-Beasts. Through the four encounters of this mod, he will tell tales of his time at sea, and the various monsters he encountered.
State.Name: Whispers of the Depths - Quest Mod

Original.Name: Why I Came to Skyrim - Origin Stories-167166-2-02-1776427542.zip

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: This mod provides 40 possible new starting quests to give some initial purpose to your character. It gives some motivation and guidance to the start of your game. Mod works alongside Alternate Start mods and the quests make full use of the radiant system so no quest is ever the same.
State.Name: Why I Came to Skyrim - Origin Stories

State.Author: Jonx0r
State.Description: The East Empire Company commissions the Dragonborn to slay a dragon that is interrupting trade routes throughout Skyrim. But is the dragon stirring up trouble with a particular reason and what sinister motive does it have for its actions?
State.Name: Wyrmstooth

State.Author: ENR
State.Description:
The time has come to cross swords with your destined rival. 

One who has gone through all the same trials and tribulations as you.

To determine who shall carry on to greater heights...
State.Name: An Ebony Warrior Boss overhaul - Vigil's Last Reward -

State.Author: Enodoc
State.Description: Dawnstar's Housecarl will now also serve as Steward for any quests which require that position.
State.Name: A Steward for Dawnstar

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: These are the patches, tweaks and some standalone small mods I've prepared for the collection "Gate to Sovngarde". Most of it requires everything else in the collection, but there are some standalone things you might find useful for your playthrough or your own collection. Check the files for more info.
State.Name: GATE TO SOVNGARDE (GTS) - Small Mods and Resources

State.Author: Shazdeh2
State.Description: You can ask alchemists to identify the ingredients' effects for you, at a cost.
State.Name: Alchemical Appraisal Services

State.Author: ancient imperial dude
State.Description: New armors and weapon
State.Name: Ancient Imperial Armor SE

State.Author: FrankBlack
State.Description: A mesh and texture replacer that overhauls some of the animated objects previously missed in other mods.
State.Name: Animated Objects Overhauled aka That is NOT a spoon

State.Author: wankingSkeever
State.Description: Fixes various issues with vanilla Skyrim meshes that causes them to render incorrectly
State.Name: Assorted mesh fixes

State.Author: WhereDeadAngelsLie and Discrepancy
State.Description:
Introducing Beautifully Overhauled and Objectively Better Icons Enriched for SkyUI, (or BOOBIES for short) the ultimate icon experience enhancer!



More item types, more colors, more icons... bring some personality to your inventory
State.Name: B.O.O.B.I.E.S  (aka Immersive Icons)

State.Author: nimwraith
State.Description: Uncover the origins of a mysterious tree within the Rift and choose if you wish to meddle in such affairs.
State.Name: Bark and Bite - Witcher Inspired Quest

State.Author: Shrimperator
State.Description:
SKSE DLL to overhaul 3rd person object selection. 



Rewrites Skyrim's crosshair selection to work more like true 3rd person RPGs - no more spending 5 minutes picking up tiny gold coins from the ground!
State.Name: Better Third Person Selection - BTPS

State.Author: MadAborModding
State.Description: Fully Voiced alternate questline to obtain the Ebony Mail. Now a "friend" can trick and try to sacrifice you!
State.Name: Boethiah's Calling - Alternate Questline

State.Author: Tate Taylor and VictorF
State.Description: Adds new types of coinage of all different values to make Skyrim's economy more interesting and challenging.
State.Name: C.O.I.N. - Coins of Interesting Natures

State.Author: GiraPomba
State.Description: This mod will add some animations while interacting with the Campfire from Campfire - Complete Camping System.
State.Name: Campfire Animations

State.Author: Korodic
State.Description: Changes the collisions for different meshes used in Capital Whiterun Expansion to one that matches each mesh exactly. No more falling through certain objects or arrows bouncing back despite not visibly hitting an object.
State.Name: Capital Whiterun Expansion - More Accurate Collision

State.Author: Jonny Wang
State.Description: Replaces the ultra low quality vanilla mountain flowers with 3D flowers created from photographs.
State.Name: Cathedral - 3D Mountain Flowers

State.Author: Dr Jacopo
State.Description: A 3D replacer for the dreaded tundra cotton plant that improves performance.
State.Name: Cathedral - 3D Tundra Cotton

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: Tired of seeing your character eat bread without opening their mouth? Conditional expressions adds subtle face animations that will bring more life into your character.
State.Name: Conditional Expressions - Subtle Face Animations

State.Author: CyberSpyder
State.Description: Criminal bounties within holds decrease over time, as long as you stay away from them.
State.Name: Crime Bounty Decay SE

State.Author: Community
State.Description: CS Light config hub for Light placer
State.Name: CS Light

State.Author: AERwaevs
State.Description: Fixes lighting on water effects, smoke particles, cloud meshes, and more!
State.Name: CS Particle Patch

State.Author: Zira
State.Description: Dragon skin variation based on Dragons SE. NO plugin patches required for other dragon mods. Increases the variety of generic dragons from 7 to over 50, with unique skins for all named dragons that previously were generic.
State.Name: Diverse 4thUnknown Dragons

State.Author: Mandragorasprouts
State.Description: Statues of Daedric Lords
State.Name: Daedric Shrines - All in One

State.Author: Leo
State.Description: A collection of PBR addon for various mods.
State.Name: PBR Hub

State.Author: Tragedian
State.Description: A makeover mod for Skyrim's favorite delivery boy.

State.Author: agd25
State.Description: This mod aims the expand the later half of the main quest by giving the Dragonborn a reason to fight and kill all of the Dragon Priests in Skyrim before facing Alduin at the Throat of the World.
State.Name: Defeat the Dragon Cult

State.Author: Seb263
State.Description: This asset pack leverages the Dismembering Framework to enable dismemberment of various creatures and animals from the base game and its DLCs, with the long-term goal of including every creature in the game.
State.Name: DF - Official Creature Asset Pack

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: Your character will accumulate dirt and blood dynamically, which you can clean by swimming, standing in the rain or taking a bath. The effects are mostly visual only and do not affect gameplay. NPCs will also get bloody as a result of battles. Mod is designed to be simple and lightweight.
State.Name: Dirt and Blood - Dynamic Visual Effects

State.Author: Zira
State.Description: Dragon skin variation based on Dragons SE. NO plugin patches required for other dragon mods. Increases the variety of generic dragons from 7 to over 50, with unique skins for all named dragons that previously were generic.
State.Name: Diverse 4thUnknown Dragons

State.Author: borokoshow
State.Description: The Dragonborn UI patch for the RaceMenu mod, to be applied with DIP (Dynamic Interface Patcher).
State.Name: Dragonborn Reskin - Racemenu DIP Patch

State.Description: Dragons redesign (no .esp) - Редизайн драконов
State.Name: Dragons SE

State.Author: Mandragorasprouts - ArchonShadow
State.Description: Replaces draugr models and textures. NO ESP.
State.Name: Draugrs - New models and textures

State.Description: Community Shaders TruePBR patches for some of my mods

State.Author: QwibQwib
State.Description: Adds a brand new scarf to Skyrim with 6 different color variants.
State.Name: Scarves Of Skyrim

Original.Name: R.A.S.S. - Rain Ash And Snow Shaders-22780-3-5-1-1676742582.zip

State.Author: lKocMoHaBTl

State.Name: R.A.S.S. Rain Ash And Snow Shaders - Wet Frost Cold Dust

State.Author: Darkfox127
State.Description: Riverside Shack is a unique and fully customisable player home. You have to start by re-building the old structure after defeating the Sabre Cat which has taken up residence. The shack is part of the vanilla game, but it really didn't have much of a purpose. Along with the customisation choices, the mod also includes some great features.
State.Name: Riverside Shack

Original.Name: Smooth Arrow Trails and Fixes - Latest Version-176275-1-0-2-1775822472.zip

State.Author: Seb263
State.Description: This mod improves arrow visuals with gradual trail effects, fixes projectile collision and origin issues (including crossbow bolts), and ensures more consistent and believable arrow behavior.
State.Name: Smooth Arrow Trails and Fixes

State.Author: Rougeshot
State.Description: Transforms your vagabond looking vanilla Giants into more menacing & intimidating Giants by replacing the vanilla skeleton with a custom Giant skeleton. Guaranteed to intimidate, test courage and boost your immersion 101%
State.Name: Grandiose Giants

State.Author: Vilidran
State.Description: Replaces the appearance of 12 unique weapons, and adds some unique armaments to select NPCs from the mod Wyrmstooth.
State.Name: Wyrmstooth - Unique Weapons Reforged

State.Author: Kekistann
State.Description: Resources, patches and tweaks curated for the "Wanderer's Way" mod list which can be downloaded through Wabbajack. Unless you are downloading or updating this mod list, I wouldn't recommend installing these files on your own game.
State.Name: Wanderer's Way Resources and Patches

State.Author: Yuuri
State.Description: This is one of those mods where you go to bed, then dream of "what happens if you apply Snow Material to Windhelm ground textures". It could be a brilliant idea or bad idea, who knows??
State.Name: Windhelm Is Snowy - Base Object Swapper

State.Author: Jonx0r Faultier and tmwd
State.Description: A PBR Conversion of the assets found in the x4 Generative Upscale for Wyrmstooth.
State.Name: Wyrmstooth - PBR

State.Author: Yuril
State.Description: Yuril's Additional Resources adds new 3D models usable for the modding community. Will be updated regularly. Currently over 150 meshes
State.Name: YAR - Yuril's Additional Resources

State.Author: AndrealphusVIII
State.Description: This mod allows you to get employed by many business in Skyrim, to earn some gold and gain additional rewards.
State.Name: Andrealphus' Jobs Overhaul

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: This mod voices every single line included in the amazing "Alternate Perspective" alternate start mod by Scrab.
State.Name: Alternate Perspective - Voiced Addon

State.Author: Mihail
State.Description: In ancient times, dating as far back as the Meretich Era, groups of honorable, strong, and proud men raised their weapons against the tyranny of the Dragons in Skyrim, when almost everyone else still saw them as powerful gods to be venerated. With the return of the Dragons, these revenants rose from their tombs to resume their missions.
State.Name: Ancient Skeletons- Mihail Monsters and Animals (SE-AE version)

State.Author: AndrealphusVIII
State.Description: This is a compilation of many different tweaks to scenes to make them more impactful, or restore certain content.
State.Name: Andrealphus Scene Tweaks

State.Author: Zartar and Knight Life
State.Description: This mod allows you to cast right-handed spells while on horseback. Spell casting is fully animated. It also adds a spell to summon a horse to ride or to help you fight. Riding the summon horse will dismiss your regular horse and prevent it from fast travelling with you. (esl flagged)
State.Name: Animated Mounted Casting - Cast Spells On Horseback And Dismiss Horse

State.Author: Artisto
State.Description: A texture refinement designed to elevate the visual appeal of sails.
State.Name: Animated Ships - Finer Sails

Original.Name: Armory of the Dragon Cult - Dragon Priest Armor-94244-2-0-1717171562.7z

State.Author: ElectricSparx - Xavbio - Dareni
State.Description: Armory of the Dragon Cult expands upon Skyrim's Dragon Priest Masks, giving the player full sets of unique armor to loot off of these fearsome enemies.
State.Name: Armory of the Dragon Cult - Dragon Priest Armor

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: Climb your way up the 10 hidden mountain peaks of Skyrim. Let the wind guide you to the summit. Meditate on top of the highest spots of Skyrim to become one with the land.
State.Name: Ascend - Hidden Peaks of Skyrim

State.Author: nimwraith
State.Description: Speak with a prisoner awaiting execution and learn all about his life's biggest regrets.
State.Name: Before the End - Quest Mod

State.Author: KawaiiChamp
State.Description: A PBR conversion of DanielCoffey's Book Covers Skyrim and Book Covers Skyrim - Lost Library.
State.Name: Book Covers Skyrim PBR

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: A couple of small mods, bundled up in one. Carriage drivers will randomly comment on the weather, their day, etc. as you walk by. Also, horse armor dialogue is now voiced with generic responses instead of silent lines, which also fixes the (...) bug if you're having it. No CC requirements.
State.Name: Carriages and Stables Dialogue Bundle

State.Author: JobiWanUK
State.Description: Makes children run up to other NPCs and throw random insults at them, with appropriate responses. ESL flagged and very lightweight.
State.Name: Cheeky Kids

State.Author: TyLuis
State.Description: Conversion of several Mihail's animal mods to PBR, thus having better texture quality and reaction to light and shadow.
State.Name: Mihail Animals PBR HUB

State.Author: Mihail
State.Description: Chub Loons are plump, flightless, auk-like birds found along the icy coasts of High Rock and Skyrim. They are passive and will flee when approached. Once much more common on the northern coasts of Skyrim, they were hunted for their meat by the Nords, and only on the icy shores of Winterhold do a few flocks remain in the province.
State.Name: Chub Loons- Mihail Monsters and Animals (SE-AE)

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: Tired of hearing the same lines over and over again? This mod adds new lines to Imperials and Stormcloaks, giving them more personality and making them react to current events, their environment, the player, their enemies, their friends and more.
State.Name: Civil War Lines Expansion

State.Author: Soulmancer
State.Description: Missing ClefJ meshes for DynDOLOD 3 users
State.Name: ClefJ LOD Meshes for DynDOLOD

State.Author: BirbWalker21
State.Description: Adds Coelacanth into Skyrim and Solstheim.
State.Name: Coelacanth (Prehistoric Content Series Pt.14) SE

State.Author: jakequery
State.Description: This adds around 120 lines of new (fully voiced) dialogue to the Companions. It comes with new dialogue options, new misc dialogue & new scenes, as well as some enhancements to more under-utilized characters. I've kept a focus on keeping it as close to vanilla as possible and to not stray too far from the personalities given.
State.Name: Companions Dialogue Bundle

State.Author: Imp
State.Description: Opens the helmets from all Creation Club mods that include helmets by way of mesh and texture edits. All races supported!
State.Name: Creation Club Open Helmets

State.Author: Mihail
State.Description: 16 new variants of damaged skeletons are added to the game, after all it doesn't make sense that every skeleton reanimated by necromancy has all the bones intact. From decapitated skeletons, skeletons with missing limbs, or even not being able to hold weapons due to the complete absence of both arms, your skeleton experience will never be the same.
State.Name: Damaged Skeletons- Mihail Monsters and Animals (SE-AE version) (''undead'')

State.Author: AdamDunmer
State.Description: Hello! This mod adds 150+ lore-friendly lines of dialogue to Imperial soldiers across Skyrim! There is a plenitude of new "Greet" lines as well as thirteen new scenes (NPC-NPC conversations). They also have new things to chat about depending on the player's progress in the Civil War Imperial questline. ESPFE. Voiced by Elevenlabs AI.
State.Name: Dialogue Expansion - Imperial Soldiers

State.Author: Nerudious
State.Description: This mod aims to overhaul and enhance dragon priest behaviour while also fixing old bugs and visual inconsistencies.
State.Name: Dragon Priest Fix - Behaviour Overhaul

Original.Name: Draugrs - SE by Xtudo - Frozen Electrocuted Cmb 2K-123225-3-6-1722553135.7z

State.Author: Xtudo
State.Description: Optimized 4K-2K-1K textures. Animated Clutter version. And more to come.
State.Name: Draugrs - My patches - SE by Xtudo

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: NPCs may change their hair dynamically as time passes, adding more life and agency to the NPCs in your game. You can also change or choose their hair yourself in an immersive way, provided you have a pair of scissors with you.
State.Name: Dynamic NPC Hairstyles

State.Author: tmwd
State.Description: A conversion of the East Empire Company Armor mod to PBR

State.Name: Enhanced Rocks and Mountains - Addon

State.Author: Siberpunk
State.Description: After meeting Eisa Blackthorn at Frostmere Crypt she will now reside in Morthal and eventually rebuild the burned house that belonged to Hroggar.
State.Name: Environs - Hroggar's House

State.Author: Siberpunk
State.Description: Turns the empty warehouse by Riften’s docks into an East Empire Company outpost after the quest to eliminate Riften's skooma supply.
State.Name: Environs - Riften Warehouse

State.Author: Siberpunk
State.Description: Adds dynamic changes that occur over time to the ruined farmhouse near Whiterun. An immersion mod that adds a small change of scenery to help Skyrim's world space feel more alive.
State.Name: Environs - The Ruined Tundra Farmhouse

State.Author: Siberpunk
State.Description: Adds a series of dynamic changes and environmental details to several locations related to Talos worship. An immersion mod designed to help make the world feel more alive and consequential.
State.Name: Environs - The Shrines of Talos

State.Author: wankingSkeever
State.Description: Replaces Esbern voice lines done by a different actor.

State.Description: Replaces Falmer models and textures

State.Author: Anbeegod
State.Description: Expands Aela the Huntress with 200 immersive and lore-friendly voiced lines. Includes quest and location awareness.

State.Author: nimwraith
State.Description: Final Farewell revolves around a ghost who remains on this plane due to his and a loved one's violent murder. As you speak with the ghost more, you'll learn about his past and the journey he's embarked on to seek vengeance.

State.Author: Anbeegod
State.Description: Expands Erik the Slayer with 174 immersive, lore-friendly voiced lines. Includes quest and location awareness. Also makes Erik marriageable in an immersive way. The coming of age (b)romance you wanted.
State.Name: Follower Dialogue Expansion - Erik the Slayer

State.Author: Anbeegod
State.Description: Expands Uthgerd with 164 high-quality immersive, lore-friendly voiced lines. True to her character. Quest and location awareness.

State.Author: JobiWanUK
State.Description: Gives vanilla voiced followers idle dialogue lines to say while the player is using various crafting stations. Lightweight, highly compatible and ESL flagged.

State.Name: Forgemaster's Fingers Quest for Orcs and Blood-Kin

State.Author: JaySerpa

State.Author: Cyan49

State.Name: Goetia Animations - Magic Spell Casting

State.Author: Altair155
State.Description:
Add physics to the cape of Hammerfell Garb.

Female (CBBE, BodySlide Required)

Male (Works out of the box)
State.Name: Hammerfell Garb HDT-SMP Cape (Replacer)

Original.Name: Hammer Animation and Sound Fixes NEMESI or PANDORA-142807-1-00-1741039714.rar

State.Author: Exalderan

Original.Name: Horsemen Torch Wield Fix and Mount Tweaks SE-77303-1-3-1712010600.rar

State.Author: KhrysINXS and NickNak

State.Name: Horsemen Torch Wield Fix and Mount Tweaks SE

State.Author: Tsptds - Mxnedula - Sphyx
State.Description:
The horse overhaul you've been waiting for! Yes, that one.



HorsePower overhauls pretty much everything missing about horse riding in Skyrim. New player followup attacks, directional animations, improved handling, in-place turns, new ragdoll and sprint behaviors.



Making the exploration just work™
State.Name: HorsePower - Modernized Horse Riding (Total Riding Overhaul)

State.Author: Hvergelmir
State.Description:
The most popular (and only?) beard retexture mod for Skyrim, Beards - from Hvergelmir's Aesthetic series is now available for Skyrim: Special Edition!

Beards also enables previously unavailable beard styles Bethesda left out of the game (for good reason?)
State.Name: Beards

State.Author: Hvergelmir
State.Description: The most popular eyebrow mod for Skyrim, Brows - from Hvergelmir's Aesthetic series is now available for Skyrim: Special Edition!
State.Name: Brows

Original.Name: EVE - Ice skating fixed for real 1.4-55417-1-4-1699812483.7z

State.Author: Exalderan
State.Description: Fixes the infamous long-standing vanilla issue where attacking while slowly moving will make you slide across the ground giving the impression of an ice-skater.1H and 2H covered, NPC and Player.
State.Name: Ice skating fixed for real - No more attack sliding movement (NEMESIS compatible)

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: How comes nobody ever rejects your marriage proposal? Well, no more! Now with immersive, hilarious voiced rejections. From "I'm not drunk enough" to "Sorry, we're better off as friends".
State.Name: Immersive Rejections

State.Author: H Shirlock
State.Description: A complete design revamp of every Imperial fort, tower, and ruin in Skyrim, using a new tileset and hand-placed assets. A Northern Fortifications series mod
State.Name: Imperial Castles of Skyrim

State.Author: Jelidity
State.Description: Removes the quest from Nordic Jewelry and distributes variations of metal and gem combination into levelled lists.
State.Name: Jewels of the Nords - Nordic Jewelry Reintegration

State.Author: Kabunouveau
State.Description: New high-poly fins utilizing model space normal maps like the rest of the Argonian body so that lighting on the scales remains consistent. Available in both standalone and multiple combinations with the base game’s Argonian hairstyles.
State.Name: Kabu's Argonian Fins

State.Author: Oreo
State.Description: A complete overhaul to bandit enemies with new enemy types, more leveled tiers, and improved spells and stats.
State.Name: Lawless - A Bandit Overhaul

State.Author: jg1
State.Description: A regal hairstyle/beard for male khajiit, with optional physics.
State.Name: Lion's Mane

State.Author: JakeTheSilent
State.Description: A mod that makes male Argonian shouts sound gruffer and closer to Argonians, rather than using the default human voice.
State.Name: Male Argonian Shouts - Revoiced

State.Author: H Shirlock
State.Description: Adds new tower turret models unique to civil war forts and Helgen, with interiors for you to explore!
State.Name: Medieval Towers - Unique Civil War Forts

Original.Name: Mehrunes Dagon's Shrine Unlocked - FOMOD Installer-119502-4-4-1721150806.7z

State.Author: MadAborModding
State.Description: Adds methods to enter Mehrunes Dagon's Shrine without needing to complete Pieces of the Past or having to side with Mehrunes Dagon.
State.Name: Mehrunes Dagon's Shrine Unlocked - Pieces of the Past Quest Alternative - Voiced

State.Author: GOsteW and lilebonymace
State.Description: This mod contributes to making conversations in Skyrim as plausible and immersive as possible, with a collection of subtle fixes and improvements that feel as if they had been part of the vanilla game all along.
State.Name: Misc Dialogue Edits

State.Author: Missile
State.Description: Presets for Immersive Equipment Display for a various amount of items and some weapon display and gear positioning tweaks. Potions, Gold Purses, Headhunter's trophies, and Quest Items.
State.Name: Missile's Immersive Equipment Display Presets

State.Author: JaySerpa and GiraPomba
State.Description: Do you enjoy the mod Missives? How would you enjoy 20 new types of Missives? What about more voice variety in NPC responses? I've got you covered!
State.Name: Missives - Voice and Quest Expansion

State.Author: GOsteW and lilebonymace
State.Description: This mod adds dialogue options in a simple and immersive way to improve various conversations in the vanilla game. The responses are all voiced by using the original voice files of the game. The new options are meant to feel like they should have been in the game all along.
State.Name: More Dialogue Options

State.Author: Bottle
State.Description: NAT 3 Weathers ported to Community Shaders, taking full advantage of the latest advancements.
State.Name: NAT.CS III

State.Author: NickNak
State.Description:
Formally Ultimate Combat and Creatures Behaviour compatibility for Nemesis



NEMESIS IS NOT FULLY COMPATIBLE WITH CREATURES! This don't make Creature sex/FNIS animations work with Nemesis, this only allows behaviour modders to do creature behaviour edits
State.Name: Nemesis Creature Behaviour Compatibility

State.Author: dkdoubledub
State.Description: Adds a pair of miners who set up camp, visit Riverwood, and work in Embershard Mine after you clear it.
State.Name: New Embershard Miners

State.Author: Everglaid and Jiaye
State.Description: PBR patch for Nirn Necessities
State.Name: Nirn Necessities PBR

State.Author: Alaxouche
State.Description: A selection of patches made by me to fix incompatibilities with Northern Roads. Fixes popular mods such as Enhanced Landscapes, TGC series, Arthmoor's mods as well as less known mods.
State.Name: Northern Roads - Patches Compendium

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: This mod makes NPCs react to Frenzy/Fury/Mayhem spells. Enemies will be surprised to see their friends turning against them and will say fitting lines.
State.Name: NPCs React To Frenzy

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: You become invisible in front of people and no one bats an eye... Well, no more! With almost 300+ custom voiced reactions, NPCs will now react to both someone disappearing and someone materializing in front of them. Immersion!
State.Name: NPCs React To Invisibility

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: This mod makes NPCs smarter and capable of dealing with the most cheesy strategy Skyrim has ever seen: shooting NPCs from locations they cannot reach. They will now hide properly and relocate if necessary, while also shaming you for using dirty tactics (with 200+ voiced reactions!)
State.Name: NPCs Take Cover - Smarter Anti-Cheese AI

State.Author: Xing and GiraPomba
State.Description:
A modders resource/framework that allows to play an animation with movement enabled that blends with other existing animations, such as: weapons drawn/combat instance, sneaking, jumping, sitting and riding a horse.

This is supposed to be used with Nemesis and either Dynamic Animation Replacer or Open Animation Replacer.
State.Name: Offset Movement Animation - Nemesis - Modders Resource

State.Author: nimwraith
State.Description: Once We Were Here is a short to medium sized quest mod that revolves around Sillas, a Bosmer scholar investigating the Falmer.
State.Name: Once We Were Here - Quest Mod

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: A fully voiced, quite expanded new take on the quest Paarthurnax, giving both the Blades and Paarthurnax good reasons for their stances, and you, Dragonborn, the final choice.
State.Name: Paarthurnax - Quest Expansion

State.Author: dTry alexsylex
State.Description: SKSE plugin that allows runtime interpretation of animation payloads.
State.Name: Payload Interpreter

Original.Name: PBR textures for The Great Cities-133493-4-2-1-1733955049.zip

State.Author: jepster
State.Description: This is a rework of the textures from The Great Cities for Physical Based Rendering
State.Name: PBR textures for The Great Cities Collection

Original.Name: Pig Iron - SE by Xtudo - Fixes-128731-1-3-1725978380.7z

State.Author: Leo
State.Description: A collection of PBR addon for various mods.

State.Author: Ersh

Supports both first person and third person, as well as other NPCs and creatures. Custom collisions for new movesets. Supports SE/AE. Includes an API for other SKSE plugins.
State.Name: Precision - Accurate Melee Collisions

State.Author: JerryYOJ
State.Description: Fixes NPC (vertical) melee aiming when using Precision. Vanilla AI can't aim attacks vertically, causing NPCs to swing at air or miss targets on slopes/stairs and if target is down bleeding. This patch implements virtical pitch for NPCs to correctly aim their weapons up and down, matching Precision's dynamic weapon collision.
State.Name: Precision - NPC Combat Fix

State.Author: NickNak
State.Description: Adds Precision Functionality to Some creatures
State.Name: Precision Creatures

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: Heal downed companions by simply activating them (provided you have a healing potion with you) and they will react with voiced lines. Immersion!

State.Name: Project Porthole - Custom Doors For Modded Cities

State.Description:
04/2023 BIG UPDATE

TL:DR, This mod adds twelve unique Oblivion Gate ruins throughout Skyrim.
State.Name: s6o6t LORE - Oblivion gates AE

State.Author: SassiestAssassin
State.Description: Edits Salt and Wind textures to have a little more depth. Covers Vanilla and KS Hairdos.

State.Author: kiza054
State.Description: Retexture for Scarves of Skyrim using True PBR

State.Description: Adds new lines for all vanilla market stall sellers to attract you to their stall, with support for mod-added vanilla-voiced market traders. Lightweight, script free and ESL flagged.

State.Author: Leo
State.Description: A retexture of Creation Club's Silver Armor set with PBR and Complex Materials support.

State.Author: MadAborModding
State.Description: Adds new dialogue and improves ALL Weapons & Armor made by the Skyforge, making it actually the best forge in Skyrim. Optionally, restricts access to it until certain quests are completed.
